description_long: This is a two-story modern house surrounded by a tall privacy hedge and a solid perimeter wall. The exterior features a dark blue-gray facade with white window shutters and a flat, slightly sloped roof. The property includes a backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, poolside lounge chairs, and a covered patio area equipped with outdoor furniture and a grill. The front of the house has a driveway with a parked car and a small entry gate leading to the main door. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The landscaping is minimalistic, with a few tall trees and manicured grass areas within the enclosed yard.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark facade, white shutters, a pool, and a private walled yard. Features include a driveway, covered patio, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above the backyard, highlighting the swimming pool, patio, and rear facade with large windows and outdoor amenities.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the house, featuring the driveway, entry gate, and symmetrical window arrangement on both floors.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the house, revealing the solid wall, minimal windows, and two tall trees near the boundary.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the backyard and pool area, showing the poolside lounge chairs and the rear of the house with patio access.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small overhang, and direct access from a paved driveway through a gate.
